description:
SUMMER STARTS NOW | EXCLUSIVE DEAL BY BLACKLINE. With The Market Settling & Demand Returning, We're Moving Into Summer Early - Aligned Back To The Blackline Standard. Choose One Of The Following Exclusive Offers Redeemable On Any Of Our Stock Cars. 1. Complimentary PPF (Gloss or Satin) 2. Complimentary 1 Year Insurance Cover (T's & C's Apply) 3. AED 10,000 Auto Loan Down Payment Contribution For More Information Please Reach Out To One Of The Team Today 
 2023 Mercedes AMG G63 4.0L TC V8, AWD, 585bhp, 8 Speed Automatic. AED 679,000 AED 10,638 / Month with 20% Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 53,468 KM's - Mercedes Warranty Valid Until 6th February 2028 or 105,000kms - Mercedes Service Contract until 6th February 2027 or 60,000 KMs - Full Mercedes Service History - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Iridium Silver Metallic Paint - Nappa Leather in Black - Double Night Package - Burmester Surround Sound Speaker System - AMG Performance Exhaust - Electric Leather Memory Seats - Heated Seats - Ventilated Seats - Multi-Functional Steering Wheel - Power Sunroof - Blind Spot Assistance - Lane Assistance - Automatic Headlights - Paddle Shifters - Dual Zone Climate Control - Adaptive Cruise Control - 360 Degree Surround Camera - All Round Parking Sensors - Apple CarPlay - Satellite Navigation - Bluetooth Connectivity - 64 Colour Ambient Lighting
